revision.comment: Bot: one‑shot full reformat/process [[Template:National Criminal Justice reference/doc]]
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
revision.text:
<noinclude>
{{Draft categories|
[[Category:templates with draft categories]]
[[Category:Pages without meta categories]]
}}

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
== Usage == This template provides an external link to [[National Criminal Justice Reference Service]] (NCJRS) abstracts for publications and criminal justice journals.
This template uses one unnamed reference, the NCJ number:
{{markup |<nowiki>{{NCJ|203876}}</nowiki> |{{NCJ|203876}} }}
To search for an article, goto http://www.ncjrs.gov/abstractdb/search.asp <includeonly> <!-- Categories and interwikis go here: --> [[Category:External link templates]] </includeonly>

revision.comment: /* Usage */clean up per [[WP:CAT#T]] and [[WP:AWBREQ]] add template:Sandbox other and <includeonly>
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
